subject: A gorgon figure with writhing serpentine hair stands silhouetted in a bright doorway, while a massive petrified humanoid body lies broken on the wooden floor of a study; a red-cloaked figure crouches nearby
description: An interior study or library scene rendered in warm amber and deep shadow. In the foreground, a massive stone-grey petrified humanoid body lies face-up on a wooden floor, one hand still clutching a broken staff or pipe. A glowing ember or magical residue lingers in the fallen figure's grasp. To the middle left, a smaller figure in a red cloak or hood crouches, back turned to the viewer, apparently inspecting or responding to the scene. In the far background, a doorway blazes with warm backlight, and silhouetted in it stands a tall figure with what appears to be wild serpentine or tentacle-like protrusions from the head — the visual hallmark of a gorgon. Bookshelves line the upper left wall. Motes of light or dust drift through the air, adding atmospheric depth to the crime-scene composition.
foreground: massive petrified humanoid body on wooden floor, clutching broken staff, glowing residue in hand
background: blazing doorway with gorgon silhouette, bookshelves, wooden walls
emotion: dread and stillness — the fallen figure inert, the crouching figure tense, the doorway figure commanding
